name: Urolithin A renal calculi case series
summary: Research-letter case series from a calculi composition analysis facility identifying urolithin A in urinary stones from eight patients aged 59 to 87 years, with chemical confirmation by high-resolution mass spectrometry, tandem mass spectrometry, nuclear magnetic resonance, and infrared comparison.
population: Eight urinary-stone patients aged 59 to 87 years, seven female and one male; dietary and medication history was available from six patients
